TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carlos Arroyo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Carlos Arroyo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Carlos Arroyo mrkyas ru hagan beh sa Fajard,Puerto Rico. 2001 kawas tmosaq mqwas biru sangka' NBA. hiya ga ru Alberto tnaq htagan nha. Carlos Arroyo tmasoq mqwas biru maki Fajardo,Colegio Santiago Apostol. 1998-2001 kawas mqwas beh(FIU) hopa pqwasan biru. mopuw pitu kawas lga(17),Carlos Arroyo t'aring qnxan na pincwagan maki Puerto Rico. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo mrkjas~ɕ ru ħaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *ajar*,puerto riʦ~ʨo. **** kawas~ɕ tmos~ɕaq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕaŋkaʔ nβa. ħija ɣa ru alβerto tnaq ħtaɣan nħa. ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki *ajar*o,ʦ~ʨoleɣio s~ɕantiaɣo apos~ɕtol. ****-**** kawas~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βeħ(*iu) ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. mopuw pitu kawas~ɕ lɣa(**),ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo tʔariŋ qnxan na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan maki puerto riʦ~ʨo. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Carlos Arroyo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Carlos Arroyo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Carlos Arroyo mrkyas ru hagan beh sa Fajard,Puerto Rico. 2001 kawas tmosaq mqwas biru sangka' NBA. hiya ga ru Alberto tnaq htagan nha. Carlos Arroyo tmasoq mqwas biru maki Fajardo,Colegio Santiago Apostol. 1998-2001 kawas mqwas beh(FIU) hopa pqwasan biru. mopuw pitu kawas lga(17),Carlos Arroyo t'aring qnxan na pincwagan maki Puerto Rico. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo mrkjas~ɕ ru ħaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *ajar*,puerto riʦ~ʨo. **** kawas~ɕ tmos~ɕaq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕaŋkaʔ nβa. ħija ɣa ru alβerto tnaq ħtaɣan nħa. ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki *ajar*o,ʦ~ʨoleɣio s~ɕantiaɣo apos~ɕtol. ****-**** kawas~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βeħ(*iu) ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. mopuw pitu kawas~ɕ lɣa(**),ʦ~ʨarlos~ɕ arrojo tʔariŋ qnxan na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan maki puerto riʦ~ʨo. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
